role: HR Specialist, PXT Programs, One Medical PXT
jd_summary: One Medical PXT (Amazon's People eXperience & Technology org) seeks an HR Specialist to establish program-management excellence and drive strategic HR initiatives. Implements PMO frameworks, tools, and processes for consistent delivery across a transformation portfolio; leads HR policy evolution in partnership with Legal and HRBPs; partners with PXT and business leaders across Clinical Care Delivery and Clinical Operations; structures and delivers complex project plans with multiple dependencies and stakeholders. Salary $125,800-$170,200.
yoe_required: 5+ years of HR, talent acquisition, management consulting, or project/program management experience
sponsorship_note: Amazon is a confirmed H-1B sponsor; posting specifies no no-sponsorship restriction. Jamie is H-1B transfer-only (cap-selected) — sponsorship feasible.
concern: 5+ YOE required vs Jamie's ~3 yrs (+2 stretch, at the standing cap). Title is 'Specialist' = program-IC, not manager-with-reports, so at-level by title. Duties are genuine program/PMO + policy + data work (in scope, not clerical).
